properties.name: Kulekhani I-III
properties.downstream_effect_note: Baseline regulation signal for the Bagmati / Bihar plains system, based on current/near-term storage role; downstream sensitivity is medium.
properties.scenario_read: Only operating seasonal-storage cascade in Nepal; crucial for dry-month balancing and peaking Read as a current regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: cluster centroid of matched project points

properties.name: Tanahu
properties.downstream_effect_note: Low regulation signal for the Narayani-Gandak / Ganges system, based on current/near-term storage role; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: Most practical near-term new storage addition in the checked official set Read as a near term regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point

properties.name: Dudhkoshi Storage
properties.downstream_effect_note: Very High regulation signal for the Kosi / Ganges system, based on 1,252 GWh dry-season energy and 1,581 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: Largest quantified dry-season block in the checked official Nepal-side sources; strongest single project for winter support Read as a planned regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.source_note: NEA-linked project figures already used in project notes and questionwise analysis

properties.name: Nalsyau Gad
properties.downstream_effect_note: Very High regulation signal for the Ghaghara / Ganges system, based on 582 GWh dry-season energy and 296 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: Best dry-energy output in the JICA promising-project set Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point

properties.name: Lower Badigad
properties.downstream_effect_note: Very High regulation signal for the Narayani-Gandak / Ganges system, based on 355 GWh dry-season energy and 506 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: Large Gandaki carryover storage plus strong dry output Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: River-aligned project reference derived from registry point

properties.name: Naumure (W. Rapti)
properties.downstream_effect_note: Very High regulation signal for the Rapti-Ghaghara / Ganges system, based on 310 GWh dry-season energy and 580 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is medium.
properties.scenario_read: Very large effective storage for a medium-basin project; strong seasonal-regulation value Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: Named West Rapti / Rapti River anchor from Nominatim near Dang

properties.name: Sun Koshi No.3
properties.downstream_effect_note: Very High regulation signal for the Kosi / Ganges system, based on 336 GWh dry-season energy and 555 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: Large east-central reservoir block with meaningful dry support, though lower dry share than Nalsyau or Dudhkoshi Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.

properties.name: Madi
properties.downstream_effect_note: Medium regulation signal for the Rapti-Ghaghara / Ganges system, based on 171 GWh dry-season energy and 235 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is medium.
properties.scenario_read: Moderate MW but useful dry-energy ratio in a water-deficit medium basin Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.

properties.name: Andhi Khola
properties.downstream_effect_note: Medium regulation signal for the Narayani-Gandak / Ganges system, based on 137 GWh dry-season energy and 239 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: Smaller but still meaningful dry-energy contributor with moderate storage footprint Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river

properties.name: Kokhajor-1
properties.downstream_effect_note: Medium regulation signal for the Kosi / Ganges system, based on 94 GWh dry-season energy and 166 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is high.
properties.scenario_read: High dry-energy share for a relatively small plant; useful for distributed seasonal support Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: Kokhajor Khola river anchor from Nominatim

properties.name: Lower Jhimruk
properties.downstream_effect_note: Medium regulation signal for the Rapti-Ghaghara / Ganges system, based on 94 GWh dry-season energy and 212 MCM storage scale; downstream sensitivity is medium.
properties.scenario_read: Useful medium-basin storage candidate, though layout conflicts with Naumure in current design Read as a long run candidate regulation scenario, not as a hydrodynamic forecast.
properties.location_basis: Operating-project registry point near mapped river
